title: Cirrus: Fix minor python deprecation warning

comments.body:
Fixes this in the 'ci' task of the gating job:

```
/usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh -C ${CIRRUS_WORKING_DIR}/${SCRIPT_BASE}/packer test
make: Entering directory '/usr/src/libpod/contrib/cirrus/packer'
-c:1: YAMLLoadWarning: calling yaml.load() without Loader=... is deprecated, as the default Loader is unsafe. Please read https://msg.pyyaml.org/load for full details.
-c:1: YAMLLoadWarning: calling yaml.load() without Loader=... is deprecated, as the default Loader is unsafe. Please read https://msg.pyyaml.org/load for full details.
packer_1.4.2_linux_amd64.zip: OK
Archive:  packer_1.4.2_linux_amd64.zip
  inflating: packer                  
./packer inspect libpod_base_images.json > /dev/null
./packer inspect libpod_images.json > /dev/null
All good
make: Leaving directory '/usr/src/libpod/contrib/cirrus/packer'
```
